---
title: "Gallup Analytics"
page-layout: article
---

# Gallup Analytics

## Description

Polling and survey data platform covering U.S. and global public opinion. Supports research on attitudes, behavior, social trends, and cross-national comparisons.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Survey & Polling Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Request Required, Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Survey & Polling Data, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-gallup-analytics)
- [Request access](Yale subscribes to individual response data contact researchdata@yale.edu for access.)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
